title: Feat
description: PHB 2024 reorganized feats into four categories: Origin (granted by background), General (chosen at L4/8/12/16/19 ASI levels), Fighting Style (Fighting Style class feature picks), and Epic Boon (L19+ general feats). Each feat is an instance of the unified ability pattern — its effect_primitives plug into the same primitive library as features, spells, and conditions. Schema scaffolded in PR #84 ahead of feat content shipping.

category.description: RAW PHB 2024 feat categories. Origin feats come from backgrounds at L1; General feats from L4/8/12/16/19 ASIs; Fighting Style feats from the Fighting Style class feature (Fighter/Paladin/Ranger); Epic Boons from L19 ASI.

prerequisites.description: Conditions for taking this feat. RAW examples: level ≥ 4 (most General feats), specific ability score ≥ 13 (multiclass-shape feats), proficiency in a skill, prior feat (Epic Boons typically need L19).

required_feats.description: Feat IDs that must already be taken (e.g., Epic Boons require a non-Epic feat tree).

repeatable.description: True for feats that can be taken multiple times (Resilient — different ability each time; Skilled — different skills; Tough — repeating HP boost). PHB 2024 RAW: explicitly tagged 'You can take this Feat more than once' on the printed feat.

ability_score_increase.description: Most PHB 2024 General feats grant +1 to one of N ability scores (sometimes the choice is fixed by the feat). Origin feats typically don't grant ASI; Epic Boons grant +1 to any of three abilities.

choose.description: How many distinct ability scores get +amount. Usually 1.

from.description: Allowed abilities for the increase. Empty/missing = any.

max_score.description: Cap on the resulting score (Epic Boons can push to 30).

skill_proficiencies.description: Skills the feat grants proficiency in. Skilled feat = 3 skills. Tagged for build-time application (mirrors race.extra_skill_proficiency_slots).

effect_primitives.description: Engine-side effects the feat grants. Same primitive vocabulary as features / spells / conditions. Passive feats register modifiers at PC-build time; active feats add actions to the actor's template; triggered feats register reaction-shape hooks.

action_template.description: For feats that grant a new action (Great Weapon Master's BA attack after a kill; Charger's bonus damage on Dash; Magic Initiate's free cantrip). pc_schema's generic feature-action auto-attach pass (PR #82) picks this up if the feat is in the PC's feats_known set.
